series_metadata.series_title: International Registration Plan (IRP) Permit Agency and Agent Audits
series_metadata.series_description: Account records for permit agencies and agents authorized to process and issue temporary credentials (72-hour trip permits) under the International Registration Plan undergo regular audits for compliance to all requirements for processing and issuing IRP permits. This record series contains audit checklists, audit reports, and all supporting documentation.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: current contract period one year. Records may be imaged. If imaged, paper record may be destroyed, once electronic record is validated. ; Electronic: current contract period one year. These records are retained in BMV/IRP section''s shared drive folders
